product_overview: Investieren MVP is a personal investment analysis dashboard that serves a static frontend and a FastAPI backend to provide explainable BUY/HOLD/SELL signals, live quotes, news/macro context, and a single-user manual portfolio for educational use.
core_goals: Provide rule-based, explainable technical recommendations (BUY/HOLD/SELL) using SMA20, SMA50, RSI14, 5-day momentum, and 30-day volatility.
Surface live watchlist quotes and historical price data to support decision-making.
Deliver a single-user demo portfolio with full CRUD for manual position tracking and aggregated PnL.
Expose clear risk, warnings, and no-trade logic in analysis output to prevent automated trading misuse.
Serve a static frontend from the backend so the app is runnable locally with minimal setup.

features.name: Health check
features.description: Lightweight endpoint to verify server and dependencies are available.
user_flows: GET /api/health -> Receive 200 with {"status":"ok"}
GET /api/health -> Receive 500 with {"status":"error","detail":"database unavailable"}

features.name: Search / Autocomplete
features.description: Search stocks and ETFs by symbol or name; provide a universe list for autocomplete and discovery.
user_flows: GET /api/search?q=AAPL -> Receive 200 with array of matching symbols and metadata
GET /api/search -> Receive 422 validation error for missing query parameter
GET /api/search/universe -> Receive 200 with full universe list for client-side autocomplete
GET /api/search?q=INVALID_SYMBOL -> Receive 200 with empty array when no matches found

features.name: Watchlist & Live Quotes
features.description: Return the fixed demo watchlist with live market quotes and minimal quote metadata for the dashboard.
user_flows: GET /api/stocks -> Receive 200 with array of watchlist symbols and current quotes (price, change, timestamp)
GET /api/stocks -> Receive 503 with {"detail":"market data unavailable"} when live data provider fails

features.name: Historical Prices
features.description: Fetch historical time-series data for a symbol to power charting and analysis.
user_flows: GET /api/stocks/AAPL/history?range=1mo -> Receive 200 with time-series OHLCV for requested range
GET /api/stocks/UNKNOWN/history?range=1mo -> Receive 404 with {"detail":"symbol not found"}

features.name: Analysis / Recommendation Engine
features.description: Run the rule-based technical model (SMA20, SMA50, RSI14, 5d momentum, 30d volatility) plus macro context to return an explainable recommendation, confidence, entry/exit guidance, stop-loss, position size, and warnings.
user_flows: POST /api/analyze with JSON {"symbol":"AAPL","range":"1mo"} -> Receive 200 with {"recommendation":"BUY|HOLD|SELL","score_breakdown":{...},"confidence":...,"warnings":[],"position_size":...}
POST /api/analyze with JSON {"range":"1mo"} (missing symbol) -> Receive 422 validation error
POST /api/analyze with JSON {"symbol":"AAPL","range":"1mo"} -> Receive 200 with {"recommendation":"NO_TRADE","warnings":["high_volatility"]} when risk/no-trade logic triggers

features.name: Portfolio (single-user demo) - View & Aggregation
features.description: Expose the demo user's portfolio with aggregated PnL and position list to support manual tracking.
user_flows: GET /api/portfolio -> Receive 200 with portfolio summary including positions array and aggregated PnL
GET /api/portfolio -> Receive 200 with empty positions array when portfolio has no holdings

features.name: Portfolio - Create Position
features.description: Add a manual position to the demo portfolio (symbol, quantity, entry price, date).
user_flows: POST /api/portfolio/positions with JSON {"symbol":"AAPL","quantity":10,"entry_price":150} -> Receive 201 with created position object including id
POST /api/portfolio/positions with JSON {"symbol":"AAPL","quantity":0,"entry_price":150} -> Receive 422 validation error for invalid quantity

features.name: Portfolio - Update Position
features.description: Patch an existing portfolio position to adjust quantity, entry price, or tags.
user_flows: PATCH /api/portfolio/positions/42 with JSON {"quantity":15} -> Receive 200 with updated position object
PATCH /api/portfolio/positions/9999 with JSON {"quantity":15} -> Receive 404 with {"detail":"position not found"}

features.name: Portfolio - Delete Position
features.description: Remove a position from the demo portfolio.
user_flows: DELETE /api/portfolio/positions/42 -> Receive 204 with no content
DELETE /api/portfolio/positions/9999 -> Receive 404 with {"detail":"position not found"}

features.name: Static Frontend Serving
features.description: Serve the single-page dashboard and static assets directly from the FastAPI backend for a local runnable demo.
user_flows: GET / (or GET /index.html) -> Receive 200 with HTML of the dashboard index.html
GET /static/app.js -> Receive 200 with JavaScript asset
GET /static/missing.js -> Receive 404 not found for missing static asset

project.name: Investieren MVP
project.description: Personal investment analysis dashboard with a FastAPI backend, static frontend, live market data, technical analysis, macro context, news sentiment, and a manual portfolio.

features: Search with autocomplete for stocks and ETFs
Analysis dashboard with recommendation, risk, warnings, entry/exit, stop loss, and position sizing
Empty, loading, timeout, and no-data states
Technical analysis using RSI, SMA20, SMA50, momentum, volatility
Risk system with warnings and no-trade logic
Macro context for US, EU, and India symbols
Static asset serving for dashboard UI
